rows.yaml:
collection: FortiSOAR
playbooks:
  - name: Hello Connector
    description: Manual trigger playbook that sends an email using SMTP
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Run
      - type: connector
        name: Send Email
        arguments:
          connector: smtp
          operation: send_email
          config: ''
          params:
            to: admin@example.com
            subject: Hello from FortiSOAR
            body: This is a test email from the Hello Connector playbook
        next: End
      - type: end
        name: End

rows.yaml:
collection: Default
playbooks:
  - name: Alert Severity Router
    description: Routes alerts based on severity level
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Run
        next: Check Severity
      - type: decision
        name: Check Severity
        conditions:
          - display: High Severity
            when: "{{ vars.input.params.severity == 'High' }}"
            next: High Severity End
          - display: Other Severity
            default: true
            next: Other Severity End
      - type: end
        name: High Severity End
      - type: end
        name: Other Severity End

rows.yaml:
collection: Default
playbooks:
  - name: Fetch Alerts and Extract Data
    description: Manual trigger to fetch alerts and reference data in a variable
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Run
        next: Fetch Alerts
      
      - type: find_record
        name: Fetch Alerts
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          query:
            logic: AND
            filters: []
          partial: true
        next: Extract Alert Data
      
      - type: set_variable
        name: Extract Alert Data
        vars:
          alert_results: '{{ vars.steps.Fetch_Alerts.result }}'
          alert_count: '{{ vars.steps.Fetch_Alerts.result | length }}'
          first_alert_name: '{{ vars.steps.Fetch_Alerts[''hydra:member''] | first | default({}) | dict2items | selectattr(''key'', ''equalto'', ''name'') | map(attribute=''value'') | first | default(''N/A'') }}'
        next: End
      
      - type: end
        name: End

rows.yaml:
collection: FortiSOAR
playbooks:
  - name: Triage Alert Verdict
    description: Right-click action to triage an alert by severity and stamp a verdict field.
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Triage Alert
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          button_label: Triage Alert
          run_mode: per_record
        next: Check Severity
      - type: decision
        name: Check Severity
        conditions:
          - display: High
            when: "{{ vars.input.records[0].severity == 'High' }}"
            next: Set High Verdict
          - display: Other
            default: true
            next: Set Other Verdict
      - type: update_record
        name: Set High Verdict
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          collection: "{{ vars.input.records[0]['@id'] }}"
          resource:
            verdict: High
        next: End
      - type: update_record
        name: Set Other Verdict
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          collection: "{{ vars.input.records[0]['@id'] }}"
          resource:
            verdict: Other
        next: End
      - type: end
        name: End

rows.yaml:
collection: Default
playbooks:
  - name: Alert Auto Comment
    description: Auto-stamps a comment on newly created alerts
    is_active: true
    steps:
      - type: start_on_create
        name: Alert Created
        arguments:
          module: alerts
      - type: set_variable
        name: Prepare Comment
        vars:
          comment_text: "Alert auto-processed at {{ now() | string }}"
      - type: update_record
        name: Add Comment to Alert
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          collection: "{{ vars.input.records[0]['@id'] }}"
          resource:
            comments: "{{ vars.comment_text }}"
      - type: end
        name: Done

rows.yaml:
collection: Default
playbooks:
  - name: Alert Status Change Handler
    description: Fires when an alert status changes and updates resolution when status becomes Closed
    is_active: true
    steps:
      - type: start_on_update
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          when:
            logic: AND
            filters:
              - field: status
                op: changed
      - type: decision
        name: Check If Closed
        conditions:
          - display: Status is Closed
            when: "{{ vars.input.records[0].status == 'Closed' }}"
            next: Update Resolution
          - display: Else
            default: true
            next: End
      - type: update_record
        name: Update Resolution
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          resource:
            resolution: "{{ vars.input.records[0].status }}"
      - type: end
        name: End

collection: Default
playbooks:
  - name: Greeting Generator
    description: Takes a first name parameter and builds a greeting via Python
    parameters:
      - first_name
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Run
        arguments: {}
        next: Build Greeting
      - type: code_snippet
        name: Build Greeting
        arguments:
          code: greeting = f"Hello {inputs['first_name']}"
        next: Record Greeting
      - type: set_variable
        name: Record Greeting
        vars:
          greeting_message: '{{ vars.steps.Build_Greeting.greeting }}'
        next: End
      - type: end
        name: End

rows.yaml:
collection: Manual Review
playbooks:
  - name: Manual Approval Gate
    description: Manual trigger with approval/rejection gate that stamps verdict
    is_active: true
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Run
        next: Request Review
      - type: manual_input
        name: Request Review
        arguments:
          title: Manual Review Required
          description: Review the request and approve or reject.
        options:
          - display: Approve
            primary: true
            next: Approved
          - display: Reject
            next: Rejected
      - type: set_variable
        name: Approved
        vars:
          verdict: approved
          reviewed_at: '{{ now() }}'
        message:
          content: Request approved
          tags:
            - manual_review
            - approved
        next: End Success
      - type: set_variable
        name: Rejected
        vars:
          verdict: rejected
          reviewed_at: '{{ now() }}'
        message:
          content: Request rejected
          tags:
            - manual_review
            - rejected
        next: End Failure
      - type: end
        name: End Success
      - type: end
        name: End Failure

rows.yaml:
collection: Default
playbooks:
  - name: Find and Update Alert Severity
    description: Finds an alert by name and updates its severity to a specified level
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Start
        next: Get Alert Name
      - type: manual_input
        name: Get Alert Name
        arguments:
          title: Enter Alert Name
          description: Provide the exact or partial name of the alert to find and update
          inputs:
            - name: alert_name
              kind: text
              label: Alert Name
              required: true
            - name: new_severity
              kind: select
              label: New Severity Level
              required: true
              options:
                - Minimal
                - Low
                - Medium
                - High
                - Critical
        options:
          - display: Search and Update
            primary: true
            next: Find Alert by Name
          - display: Cancel
            next: End
      - type: find_record
        name: Find Alert by Name
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          query:
            logic: AND
            filters:
              - field: name
                operator: like
                value: "{{ vars.steps.Get_Alert_Name.alert_name }}"
          partial: true
        next: Check Alert Found
      - type: decision
        name: Check Alert Found
        conditions:
          - display: Alert Found
            when: "{{ vars.steps.Find_Alert_by_Name['hydra:member'] | length > 0 }}"
            next: Update Alert Severity
        default_branch:
          display: No Alert Found
          next: Alert Not Found
      - type: update_record
        name: Update Alert Severity
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          collection: "{{ vars.steps.Find_Alert_by_Name['hydra:member'][0]['@id'] }}"
          resource:
            severity: "{{ vars.steps.Get_Alert_Name.new_severity | picklist('severity') }}"
        next: Success
      - type: set_variable
        name: Success
        vars:
          result: "Alert severity updated successfully"
        message:
          content: "Alert severity has been updated to {{ vars.steps.Get_Alert_Name.new_severity }}"
          tags:
            - alert_update
        next: End
      - type: set_variable
        name: Alert Not Found
        vars:
          result: "No alert found matching the provided name"
        message:
          content: "Search for '{{ vars.steps.Get_Alert_Name.alert_name }}' returned no results"
          tags:
            - alert_search_failed
        next: End
      - type: end
        name: End

rows.yaml:
collection: Default
playbooks:
  - name: VirusTotal IP Reputation Check
    description: Query VirusTotal for IP reputation, branch on malicious count, and stamp verdict
    parameters:
      - ip
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Run
        next: Query VirusTotal IP

      - type: connector
        name: Query VirusTotal IP
        arguments:
          connector: virustotal
          operation: query_ip
          config: ''
          params:
            ip: '{{ vars.input.params.ip }}'
        next: Check Malicious Count

      - type: decision
        name: Check Malicious Count
        conditions:
          - display: High Risk
            when: '{{ vars.steps.Query_VirusTotal_IP.is_malicious | int > 5 }}'
            next: Set High Risk Verdict
          - display: Medium Risk
            when: '{{ vars.steps.Query_VirusTotal_IP.is_malicious | int > 0 and vars.steps.Query_VirusTotal_IP.is_malicious | int <= 5 }}'
            next: Set Medium Risk Verdict
          - display: Else
            default: true
            next: Set Clean Verdict

      - type: set_variable
        name: Set High Risk Verdict
        vars:
          verdict: High Risk
          malicious_count: '{{ vars.steps.Query_VirusTotal_IP.is_malicious }}'
        next: End

      - type: set_variable
        name: Set Medium Risk Verdict
        vars:
          verdict: Medium Risk
          malicious_count: '{{ vars.steps.Query_VirusTotal_IP.is_malicious }}'
        next: End

      - type: set_variable
        name: Set Clean Verdict
        vars:
          verdict: Clean
          malicious_count: '{{ vars.steps.Query_VirusTotal_IP.is_malicious }}'
        next: End

      - type: end
        name: End

rows.yaml:
collection: Sample Collection
playbooks:
  - name: Confirm Before Block
    description: Pause for SOC analyst approval before blocking an IP or entity
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Run
        next: Approval Request

      - type: manual_input
        name: Approval Request
        arguments:
          title: Confirm Block Action
          description: Review and approve the block action before proceeding.
        options:
          - display: Approve
            primary: true
            next: Record Approval
          - display: Reject
            next: Record Rejection

      - type: set_variable
        name: Record Approval
        vars:
          action_status: approved
          action_timestamp: '{{ now() }}'
          action_notes: Block action approved by analyst
        message:
          content: Block action has been **approved** and will proceed.
          tags:
            - automation
            - approved

      - type: set_variable
        name: Record Rejection
        vars:
          action_status: rejected
          action_timestamp: '{{ now() }}'
          action_notes: Block action rejected by analyst
        message:
          content: Block action has been **rejected** by analyst.
          tags:
            - automation
            - rejected

      - type: end
        name: End Approved

      - type: end
        name: End Rejected

rows.yaml:
collection: FortiSOAR
playbooks:
  - name: Block or Allow IP Address
    description: Prompt analyst to enter an IP and choose to block or allow it
    steps:
      - type: manual_input
        name: Analyst Decision
        arguments:
          title: Block or Allow IP Address
          description: Enter the IP address to manage and select an action (block or allow)
          inputs:
            - name: ip_address
              kind: ipv4
              label: IP Address
              required: true
            - name: action
              kind: select
              label: Action
              required: true
              options:
                - Block
                - Allow
        options:
          - display: Block
            primary: true
            next: Check Action Block
          - display: Allow
            next: Check Action Allow

      - type: decision
        name: Check Action Block
        conditions:
          - display: Block IP
            when: "{{ vars.steps.Analyst_Decision.input.action == 'Block' }}"
            next: Block IP on FortiGate
        default_branch:
          display: Else
          next: Log Allow Action

      - type: connector
        name: Block IP on FortiGate
        arguments:
          connector: fortigate-firewall
          operation: block_ip_new
          config: ''
          params:
            method: Quarantine Based
            ip_addresses: "{{ vars.steps.Analyst_Decision.input.ip_address }}"
            time_to_live: 1 Day
            vdom: ''
        next: Log Block Action

      - type: set_variable
        name: Log Block Action
        vars:
          action_taken: block
          target_ip: "{{ vars.steps.Analyst_Decision.input.ip_address }}"
        message:
          content: "IP address {{ vars.steps.Analyst_Decision.input.ip_address }} has been blocked on FortiGate"
          tags:
            - firewall_action
            - blocked_ip
        next: End

      - type: set_variable
        name: Log Allow Action
        vars:
          action_taken: allow
          target_ip: "{{ vars.steps.Analyst_Decision.input.ip_address }}"
        message:
          content: "IP address {{ vars.steps.Analyst_Decision.input.ip_address }} was allowed (no action taken)"
          tags:
            - firewall_action
            - allowed_ip
        next: End

      - type: end
        name: End

rows.yaml:
collection: Default
playbooks:
  - name: Block URL via Akamai Network Lists API
    description: Takes a URL from analyst input, posts it to the Akamai Network Lists API, and comments the result on the triggering record.
    parameters:
      - bearer_token
    is_active: true
    steps:
      - type: start
        name: Run
        arguments:
          module: alerts
          button_label: Block URL via Akamai
          requires_record: true
        next: Get URL From Analyst
      - type: manual_input
        name: Get URL From Analyst
        arguments:
          title: Block URL in Akamai
          description: Enter the URL to block via Akamai Network Lists API.
          inputs:
            - name: url_to_block
              kind: url
              label: URL to Block
              required: true
        options:
          - display: Submit
            primary: true
            next: Post To Akamai
          - display: Cancel
            next: End
      - type: connector
        name: Post To Akamai
        arguments:
          connector: http
          operation: http_post
          config: ''
          params:
            rest_api: https://api.akamai.com/network-list/v2/network-lists
            header:
              Authorization: 'Bearer {{ vars.input.params.bearer_token }}'
              Content-Type: application/json
            data:
              networkListType: IP_CIDR
              listItems:
                - '{{ vars.steps.Get_URL_From_Analyst.input.url_to_block }}'
        next: Comment Result
      - type: set_variable
        name: Comment Result
        vars:
          api_status: '{{ vars.steps.Post_To_Akamai.status_code | default("Unknown") }}'
        message:
          content: 'Akamai Network Lists API Response: HTTP {{ vars.api_status }}'
          tags:
